{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/35772301?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/fg0x0", "id": 35772301, "login": "fg0x0", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjM1NzcyMzAx", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/fg0x0", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54290", "cvss": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-942", "name": "Permissive Cross-domain Security Policy with Untrusted Domains"}], "description": "### Summary

With `credentials: true` and no explicit `origin` (the default wildcard), the CORS Middleware reflects the request's `Origin` and sends `Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true`. Any site can then make credentialed cross-origin requests and read the responses, exposing cookie-authenticated endpoints to arbitrary origins.

### Details

The spec forbids `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *` with credentials and browsers reject it, so this configuration used to fail closed. In affected versions the middleware reflects the request `Origin` instead, so it now succeeds for every origin, including `null`. The preflight also echoes the requested headers back, approving non-simple credentialed requests too.

This issue arises when an application enables `credentials: true` and leaves `origin` unset or set to the wildcard.

### Impact

Any third-party page a logged-in user visits can read the application's cookie-authenticated endpoints and perform credentialed state-changing requests. This affects applications that enable credentialed CORS without restricting `origin`.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00248, "percentile": 0.15781}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-88fw-hqm2-52qc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-16T14:15:39Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-88fw-hqm2-52qc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-88fw-hqm2-52qc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54290"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-16T14:15:39Z", "references": ["https://github.com/honojs/hono/security/advisories/GHSA-88fw-hqm2-52qc", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-88fw-hqm2-52qc"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/honojs/hono/security-advisories/GHSA-88fw-hqm2-52qc", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/honojs/hono", "summary": "hono: CORS Middleware reflects any Origin with credentials when `origin` defaults to the wildcard", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-16T14:15:40Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-88fw-hqm2-52qc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.12.25", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "hono"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.12.25"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: hono: CORS Middleware reflects any Origin with credentials when `origin` defaults to the wildcard
